zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Mathew Cradock於大約1458年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根斯萬希亞時，他的父親Richard Cradock56歲，母親Jennet Horton25歲。他於1477年與Alice de Maunsell在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1531年7月享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Mathew Cradock于大约1458年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根斯萬希亞时，他的父亲Richard Cradock56岁，母亲Jennet Horton25岁。他于1477年与Alice de Maunsell在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1531年7月享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cradock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Craddock
meanings: Welsh and English: from the Welsh personal name Caradawc, Cradawc, Caradoc, Caradog meaning ‘amiable’, familiar in its Latin form Caractacus (but correctly Caratacus, for British Celtic Caratācos, from the stem carat- ‘dear, love’), a British prince who was taken as prisoner to Rome in about 51 AD for his leadership of a revolt against the Roman occupation.
Americanized form of German   Gredig  . Compare   Graddick  .

nameMeanings.name: Mathew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Mathew Cradock was born about 1458, in Swansea, Glamorgan, Wales, his father, Richard Cradock, was 56 and his mother, Jennet Horton, was 25. He married Alice de Maunsell in 1477, in Gwyr, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died in July 1531, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Mathew Cradock est né environ 1458, à Swansea, Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Richard Cradock, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Jennet Horton, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Maunsell en 1477, à Gwyr, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en juillet 1531, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Mathew Cradock um 1458 in Swansea, Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Cradock 56 und seine Mutter Jennet Horton 25. Er hat 1477 in Gwyr, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom Alice de Maunsell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb im Juli 1531 im Alter von 74 Jahren.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Mathew Cradockが約1458年にウェールズグラモーガンスワンセアで生まれた時，父Richard Cradockは56歳，母Jennet Hortonは25歳であった。1477年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガングウイルでAlice de Maunsellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1531年7月に74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Mathew Cradock(이)가 대략 1458년 웨일스 글램르건 스완시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Cradock(은)는 56세였고, 그의 어머니 Jennet Horton(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1477년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 그w이르에서 Alice de Maunsell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1531년 7월 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Mathew Cradock родился около 1458 г. в местности свансеа, глэморган, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Richard Cradock было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Jennet Horton, 25.
